title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 Released
description: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 4.6, a full upgrade across coding, computer use, long-context reasoning, agent planning, knowledge work, and design. The model features a 1M token context window in beta and approaches Opus-level intelligence at a lower price point. Users preferred Sonnet 4.6 over Sonnet 4.5 roughly 70% of the time in Claude Code testing, and even preferred it to Opus 4.5 59% of the time due to less overengineering and better instruction following.
